div1.entryFree: Gawd, any worthless thing giving joy, a bawble, a toy: rings, --s, conceits, Mids. I, 1, 33. as the remembrance of an idle g. which in my childhood I did dote upon, IV, 1, 172. for these other --s, I'll pull them off, Shr. II, 3 (O. Edd. goods). the proud day is all too wanton and too full of --s to give me audience, John III, 3, 36. all with one consent praise new-born --s, Troil. III, 3, 176.
